package: 第 11 包：Focus 参数语义设计与手动 Focus 接入前置方案

included: 点击对焦与长按锁定优先级收口
Focus A/M/L/-- 状态语义定稿
下一包 Focus 接入边界与最小改动拆解
excluded: 长按 AE/AF 锁定行为改写

key_findings.tap_path: handlePreviewTap -> applyFocusExposure(lockAfterFocus: false), manual/locked 下会被拦截
key_findings.long_press_path: handlePreviewLongPress -> lock/unlock AEAF, manual 下禁止进入 AEAF lock
key_findings.manual_focus_capability: setManualFocusLensPosition / restoreAutofocusMode 已存在，设备能力通过 isLockingFocusWithCustomLensPositionSupported 判断

recommended_contract.tap_behavior_when_manual: 保持点按不改对焦（不退出 M）
recommended_contract.focus_auto_button: 仅恢复 AF，不隐式清 AE/AF lock

next_package_name: Focus 短竖向滚轮交互化 + Auto / Manual Focus 写入接入
